Reduced Inequalities.reason: The objective to "reach diverse audiences" can be inferred to support social inclusion (Target 10.2), but the course does not focus on reducing systemic inequalities.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The discussion of "ethical dimensions" in media could tangentially relate to transparent institutions (Target 16.6) or public access to information (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops skills in "teamwork and communication coordination" and includes "Intercollegiate activities," which are foundational for building partnerships as per Target 17.17.
